build.warnings_note: unchanged from v7, pre-existing generator nullables

bonus_production_fix_audited.change: drop identitydata alias in RegisterDomainTypes; Identity now resolves via class-level [PlangType("identity")]
bonus_production_fix_audited.audit: no live source references to 'identitydata' remain (only frozen LLM-trace JSONs under Tests/Error/Multilingual/.build/traces/). Pinned by N4 test ReturnTypeName_DataOfIdentity_IsIdentity.

observations.title: RegisterDomainTypes is now empty - no guard against future [PlangType] shadowing
observations.note: After dropping the identitydata alias, the method is a no-op hook. A future Register("x", typeof(X)) that re-shadows a [PlangType] attribute would only surface incidentally (if X is among N4's seven pinned types). A generic 'attribute name beats runtime override' test would close it. Speculative; not blocking.
